expectations.text: Constructs JQL with project = PLATFORM, type = Bug, priority in High/Highest, status = Blocked
expectations.evidence: Section 1 shows JQL: 'project = PLATFORM AND issuetype = Bug AND priority IN (Highest, High) AND status = Blocked ORDER BY updated DESC'.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs search with the JQL query
expectations.evidence: Section 2 shows: 'jira.mjs search' with the full JQL query and '--max 50'.

expectations.text: Mentions presenting results with key, summary, assignee, and last updated
expectations.evidence: Section 3 shows a presentation table with columns: Issue Key, Summary, Priority, Assignee, Last Updated.
